name: RampUp Lead – Part 2 (Confirmation Email to Lead)

nodes.name: Has Email?
nodes.notes: Only send confirmation if lead provided an email address. False branch is discarded — workflow continues.

parameters.subject: We've received your request — RampUp
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.name }},

Thank you for reaching out to RampUp.

We've received your details and our team will review your restaurant and get back to you within 24 hours.

What happens next:
We'll look at your current setup and prepare some initial thoughts before we connect.

If you have any questions in the meantime, feel free to reply to this email.

Best,
The RampUp Team
hello@rampupth.com

nodes.name: Send Confirmation Email
nodes.notes: onError: continueRegularOutput — if email fails the workflow continues to the next step (Google Sheets)

nodes.name: Continue to Sheets
nodes.notes: Merge point — connect both branches of Has Email? here, then wire to Google Sheets node in Part 3
